y := sin(t)^3;
d := 0.1;
dx := diff(x, t);
dy := diff(y, t);
denominator := sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2);
x_offset_pos := x + dy*d/denominator;
y_offset_pos := y - dx*d/denominator;
x_offset_neg := x - dy*d/denominator;
y_offset_neg := y + dx*d/denominator;

sI := solve(kI = -1/d, t);
